glosses.ja: 音楽的な; 旋律的な

sentences.target: On regarde un film musical ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʁə.ɡaʁd œ̃ film my.zi.kal sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: On regarde un film musical ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʁə.ɡaʁd œ̃ film my.zi.kal sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We’re watching a musical movie tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche vemos una película musical.
translations.de: Wir schauen heute Abend einen Musicalfilm.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 뮤지컬 영화를 볼 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今晚看一部歌舞片。
translations.yue: 我哋今晚睇一套歌舞片。
translations.ru: Мы сегодня вечером смотрим музыкальный фильм.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vamos ver um filme musical.
translations.tr: Bu akşam müzikal bir film izliyoruz.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi xem một bộ phim nhạc kịch.
translations.uk: Ми сьогодні ввечері дивимося музичний фільм.
translations.hu: Ma este egy zenés filmet nézünk.
translations.hi: आज रात हम एक संगीतमय फ़िल्म देख रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα το βράδυ βλέπουμε μια μουσική ταινία.
translations.nb: Vi ser en musikalfilm i kveld.
translations.id: Malam ini kami menonton film musikal.
translations.ro: În seara asta vizionăm un film muzical.
translations.cs: Dnes večer se díváme na muzikálový film.
translations.da: Vi ser en musicalfilm i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜ミュージカル映画を見ます.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person singular form used for generic 'one' or colloquial 'we'); controls 3SG agreement on the verb.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, takes the direct object 'un film musical'.
Indefinite article determiner, masculine singular; introduces a new, non-specific referent.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the noun phrase functioning as the verb’s direct object.
Adjective, masculine singular; postnominal modifier classifying the type/genre of 'film'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; forms the temporal NP 'ce soir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; with 'ce' forms a time expression functioning as an adverbial complement.

sentences.target: Ta sœur a un talent musical incroyable.
sentences.reading: /ta sœʁ a œ̃ talɑ̃ my.zi.kal ɛ̃.kʁwa.jabl/

translations.fr: Ta sœur a un talent musical incroyable.
translations.ipa: /ta sœʁ a œ̃ talɑ̃ my.zi.kal ɛ̃.kʁwa.jabl/
translations.en: Your sister has incredible musical talent.
translations.es: Tu hermana tiene un talento musical increíble.
translations.de: Deine Schwester hat ein unglaubliches musikalisches Talent.
translations.it: Tua sorella ha un talento musicale incredibile.
translations.ko: 네 여동생은 놀라운 음악적 재능이 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你妹妹有惊人的音乐天赋。
translations.yue: 你妹妹有驚人嘅音樂天賦。
translations.ru: У твоей сестры невероятный музыкальный талант.
translations.pt: Sua irmã tem um talento musical incrível.
translations.tr: Kız kardeşinin inanılmaz bir müzik yeteneği var.
translations.vi: Em gái bạn có tài năng âm nhạc tuyệt vời.
translations.nl: Je zus heeft een ongelooflijk muzikaal talent.
translations.uk: У твоєї сестри неймовірний музичний талант.
translations.hu: A lánytestvérednek hihetetlen zenei tehetsége van.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी बहन में संगीत की अद्भुत प्रतिभा है.
translations.pl: Twoja siostra ma niesamowity talent muzyczny.
translations.el: Η αδελφή σου έχει απίστευτο μουσικό ταλέντο.
translations.nb: Søsteren din har et utrolig musikalsk talent.
translations.id: Saudara perempuanmu memiliki bakat musik yang luar biasa.
translations.sv: Din syster har en otrolig musikalisk talang.
translations.ro: Sora ta are un talent muzical incredibil.
translations.cs: Tvoje sestra má neuvěřitelný hudební talent.
translations.da: Din søster har et utrolig musikalsk talent.
translations.ja: あなたの姉妹には驚くべき音楽の才能があります.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, feminine singular; agrees with 'sœur'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject head of the clause.
Lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes 'un talent musical incroyable' as its direct object.
Indefinite article determiner, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'talent'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the object NP.
Adjective, masculine singular; postnominal modifier describing the domain/type of the talent.
Adjective (invariable for gender, variable for number), masculine singular here; intensifies the quality of 'talent'.

sentences.target: Je préfère un stage musical cet été.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pʁe.fɛʁ œ̃ staʒ my.zi.kal sɛt e.te/

translations.fr: Je préfère un stage musical cet été.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pʁe.fɛʁ œ̃ staʒ my.zi.kal sɛt e.te/
translations.en: I prefer a music camp this summer.
translations.es: Prefiero un campamento de música este verano.
translations.de: Ich bevorzuge ein Musikcamp diesen Sommer.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个夏天我更想参加音乐夏令营。
translations.yue: 我呢個夏天更鍾意參加音樂夏令營。
translations.ru: Этим летом я предпочитаю музыкальный лагерь.
translations.pt: Neste verão eu prefiro um acampamento musical.
translations.he: בקיץ הזה אני מעדיף מחנה מוזיקה.
translations.tr: Bu yaz bir müzik kampını tercih ederim.
translations.vi: Mùa hè này tôi thích trại âm nhạc hơn.
translations.nl: Deze zomer geef ik de voorkeur aan een muziekkamp.
translations.uk: Цього літа я віддаю перевагу музичному табору.
translations.hu: Idén nyáron inkább zenei tábort szeretnék.
translations.hi: इस गर्मी मुझे संगीत कैंप ज्यादा पसंद है.
translations.el: Αυτό το καλοκαίρι προτιμώ μια μουσική κατασκήνωση.
translations.nb: Denne sommeren foretrekker jeg en musikkleir.
translations.id: Musim panas ini saya lebih suka ikut kamp musik.
translations.sv: I sommar föredrar jag ett musikläger.
translations.ro: Vara asta prefer o tabără de muzică.
translations.da: Denne sommer foretrækker jeg en musiklejr.
translations.ja: 今年の夏は音楽キャンプがいいです.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; controls verb agreement.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes 'un stage musical' as object.
Indefinite article determiner, masculine singular; introduces 'stage'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the object NP.
Adjective, masculine singular; postnominal modifier specifying the field/type of the 'stage'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular (form used before vowel/h muet); introduces the temporal noun 'été'.
Common noun, masculine singular; with 'cet' forms a temporal NP functioning as an adverbial complement.

sentences.target: Votre voisin organise un atelier musical demain.
sentences.reading: /vɔtʁ vwa.zɛ̃ ɔʁ.ɡa.niz œ̃ a.tə.lje my.zi.kal də.mɛ̃/

translations.fr: Votre voisin organise un atelier musical demain.
translations.ipa: /vɔtʁ vwa.zɛ̃ ɔʁ.ɡa.niz œ̃ a.tə.lje my.zi.kal də.mɛ̃/
translations.en: Your neighbor is organizing a music workshop tomorrow.
translations.es: Tu vecino organiza un taller de música mañana.
translations.de: Dein Nachbar organisiert morgen einen Musikworkshop.
translations.it: Il tuo vicino organizza un laboratorio musicale domani.
translations.ko: 네 이웃이 내일 음악 워크숍을 열어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的邻居明天举办一个音乐工作坊。
translations.yue: 你嘅鄰居聽日搞一個音樂工作坊。
translations.ru: Твой сосед завтра организует музыкальный мастер-класс.
translations.pt: Seu vizinho está organizando uma oficina de música amanhã.
translations.he: השכן שלך מארגן סדנת מוזיקה מחר.
translations.tr: Komşun yarın bir müzik atölyesi düzenliyor.
translations.vi: Hàng xóm của bạn đang tổ chức một buổi workshop âm nhạc vào ngày mai.
translations.nl: Je buurman organiseert morgen een muziekworkshop.
translations.uk: Твій сусід завтра організовує музичний майстер-клас.
translations.hu: A szomszédod holnap zenei workshopot szervez.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा पड़ोसी कल एक संगीत कार्यशाला आयोजित कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Twój sąsiad jutro organizuje warsztaty muzyczne.
translations.el: Ο γείτονάς σου διοργανώνει ένα μουσικό εργαστήριο αύριο.
translations.nb: Naboen din arrangerer et musikkverksted i morgen.
translations.id: Tetanggamu sedang menyelenggarakan lokakarya musik besok.
translations.sv: Din granne ordnar en musikworkshop i morgon.
translations.ro: Vecinul tău organizează mâine un atelier muzical.
translations.cs: Tvůj soused zítra pořádá hudební workshop.
translations.da: Din nabo arrangerer en musikworkshop i morgen.
translations.ja: あなたの近所の人が明日音楽ワークショップを開催します.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 2nd person plural/formal; agrees with 'voisin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject head of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes 'un atelier musical' as its direct object.
Indefinite article determiner, masculine singular; introduces 'atelier'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the object NP.
Adjective, masculine singular; postnominal modifier specifying the theme/focus of 'atelier'.
Adverb of time; situates the event in the near future.
